refs.description: Open Source Routing Machine computes driving directions on OpenStreetMap data using shortest-path search (Dijkstra/contraction hierarchies).
NetworkX's reference Dijkstra implementation (dijkstra_path / _dijkstra_multisource) — heavily commented Python.
Valhalla's routing core runs label-correcting shortest-path search (a Dijkstra variant) over a tiled road graph.
